  "action_vector": {
      "funding_boost": 0.8,

      "resource_realloc": 0.8,

   "reasoning": "We need to focus on getting more money to our teachers and keeping our enrollment up, so I'm pushing for some extra funding and incentives. The scholarships will help with retention, but we shouldn't overdo it – we need to make sure our current students are staying put. Attendance mandate is a good idea, but we don't want to scare off our struggling kids. Resource reallocation and transparency are must-haves, and counseling programs will help with teacher burnout. Staff hiring is a big no from me, we can't afford the long-term commitment.",
   "confidence": 0.85
}
